title: harrisia fragrans
intro: Harrisia fragrans, also known as the night-blooming cereus or queen of the night, is a species of cactus that belongs to the Cactaceae family and is native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Harrisia fragrans include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Harrisia fragrans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
